channel.title: TL;DR News — Daily AI Intelligence
channel.description: AI-generated daily news summaries across world, business, technology, sports, and science.

item.title: World News Summary — 2026-03-09
item.description: Iran's new supreme leader is expected to continue hardline policies, while G7 discussions on oil stock releases remain unresolved amid rising prices.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-03-09
item.description: Oil prices surged above $100 a barrel amid geopolitical tensions, raising concerns about inflation and economic recovery.

item.title: Technology News Summary — 2026-03-09
item.description: Hasbro's CEO discusses AI in toy design, while Apple introduces new high-end products and reviews of the iPhone 17E and iPad Air M4 are mixed.

item.title: Sports News Summary — 2026-03-09
item.description: NFL free agency is underway with significant trades and releases, including the Dolphins' decision to release Tua Tagovailoa and trade Minkah Fitzpatrick.

item.title: Science News Summary — 2026-03-09
item.description: Recent scientific discoveries range from new insights into quantum mechanics to advancements in understanding depression and ancient pathogens.
